name: rage-jokes
description: Make roasting jokes about misogynists, Trump, Musk, Republicans, etc.
description_long: This skill adds the ability to make sharp, unapologetic roasts about misogynists and their enablers. Targets include Donald Trump, Elon Musk, J.K. Rowling, US Republicans, MAGA movement, Fox News, and many others. The bot crafts cutting jokes in the rage bot's voice - no holding back, no softening the blow.
